# MDX Sample

This document demonstrates GFM formatting inside an MDX file.

## Features

| Feature     | Status | Notes                     |
| :---------- | :----- | :------------------------ |
| Tables      | ✅      | GFM table formatting      |
| Task lists  | ✅      | - [x] Done, - [ ] Pending |
| Code blocks | ✅      | Language tags preserved   |
| Blockquotes | ✅      | > quoted content          |

- [x] Initialize project
- [x] Configure formatter
- [ ] Write documentation

> MDX files are formatted as Markdown with JSX support. The structural guard validates GFM elements only.

## Code Examples

```javascript
// This code block is preserved (embeddedLanguageFormatting: off)
const greeting = 'hello';
function sayHello() {
  return greeting;
}
```

```typescript
export interface User {
  id: number;
  name: string;
}
```
